geopolitics_summary: EU faces rising LNG competition from Asia; internal pressure on methane rules; AI demand threatens climate targets amid energy security concerns.

themes.headline: Europe warned of rising LNG bidding war competition with China
themes.why_it_matters: Direct TTF risk. Asia outbidding EU for LNG cargoes tightens European supply; forces higher spot/forward curve and winter storage fill risk if competition intensifies.

themes.headline: EU greenhouse gas emissions rose in 2025; decarbonisation stalling
themes.why_it_matters: EUA pressure if emissions drift above linear reduction trajectory. May trigger carbon border adjustment or backstop measures; near-term EUA volatility as policy response debated.

themes.headline: Data center lobby claims gas plants needed to support EU AI expansion
themes.why_it_matters: Rising baseload demand narrative. If AI load growth materialises, supports power & gas curve through 2027–28; challenges green-only transition, reducing downside risk to DA spreads.

themes.headline: Fossil fuel firms lobby to weaken EU methane emissions rules
themes.why_it_matters: Regulatory uncertainty. Methane rules affect upstream capex & supply cost; weakening would ease production, but political outcome still unclear—monitor Commission stance for mid/downstream gas price implications.

themes.headline: Permian natural gas production surged 60% from 2021 to 2025
themes.why_it_matters: US LNG export capacity increasing. Higher Permian output supports transatlantic arbitrage and winter LNG availability to EU; downside risk to TTF on ample global supply narrative.

watchlist: European Council summit (Thu 19 June) — trade/energy policy direction; watch for China, LNG, deregulation signals.
EU methane rule renegotiation outcome — Q3 2026 Commission decision; upstream cost/supply pass-through risk.
Q3 2026 EUA auction calendar and emissions data; linear reduction trajectory tracking.
AI data center load forecast updates and grid impact assessments; baseline demand assumptions for winter 2026–27.
